calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Set For Trial On Dec-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Continued To Dec-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-26-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant Sherif Eldash is present. Respondent/Plaintiff Diana Shek is present.

This case comes on calendar regularly for Trial De Novo.
All Parties are sworn.

Ms. Shek commences presentation of her case and offers the following Exhibits.
Exhibit E - Text Messages, Venmo Printout, Photos.

Mr. Eldash commences presentation of his case and offers the following Exhibits.
Exhibit 4C - SC-100
Exhibit 4D - Bills, trash schedule
Exhibit 2A - Itemization.
Exhibit 2C - Security Deposit Refund Letter.
Exhibit 2F - Photo of Condition of the room.
Exhibit 3E - Text to Landlord
Exhibit 3A - Notice of Violation
Exhibit 4 - "Section 4" Shows the Condition of the furnished room

Ms. Shek commences reply and offers and unmarked Exhibit
Exhibit - Text message from Mar-8-2023

Mr. Eldash gives reply regarding Repondents statement of number of roommates.

Plaintiff/Respondent and Defendant/Appellant Exhibits retained. At the conclusion of the case, the matter is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Not Reported. (D305)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Judgment Entered

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-29-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Diana Shek, Respondent/Plaintiff
Sherif Eldash, Appellant/Defendant

The Court confirms that both parties were properly served with the appeals notice.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Diana Shek testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Three photographs of apartment room and stairway
Exhibit 2 - Truck rental receipt (2 pages)
Exhibit 3 - March 30, 2025 letter regarding security deposit refund (2 pages)
Exhibit 4 - Screenshots of texts between the parties regarding Venmo payment (14 pages)

Mr. Eldash, Appellant/Defendant, testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - Text dated 2/21/24 between the parties
Exhibit B - Venmo screenshot of remaining security deposit returned
Exhibit C - San Francisco Superior Court Register of Actions (1 page)
Exhibit D - Proof of Service - Motion to Vacate
Exhibit E - Screen shots of Plaintiff's Venmo Payments (2 pages)

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not reported, (305).
